features: Dove Women Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Spray - Go Fresh Pomegranate - 250 ml
Dove is the only deodorant with 1/4 moisturising cream Dove and Vitamin E.
The armpit skin is noticeably soft and visibly smoother.
The fresh, nature-inspired fragrance of pomegranate and lemon verbena, gives your armpits a refreshing and light sensation, leaving you feeling fresh and dry all day
